description: Borderlands The Pre-Sequel is a looter shooter we all love.

be-82.description:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues.
Good luck out there, Slab!

setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)

[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)

new stuff (since 0.5.3):
- "alternates" for logic
- other changes to logic: locations are removed if any required region is excluded, levels detected differently, gear licenses not required if the setting is off
- integrate always on level
- The Pre-Sequel initial integration
be-82.title: bleeding edge

v0.5.4.description:
Relatively well-tested release from mid-late June.
new stuff:
- "alternates" for logic
- buncha logic fixes
- other changes to logic: locations are removed if any required region is excluded, levels detected differently, gear licenses not required if the setting is off
- integrate always on level
- Tracker tab in Client if UT is installed
- new ramp in hayters folly
v0.5.4.title: v0.5.4
